description: Celebrate the love for pasta with a clean, modern newsletter designed for food and beverage enthusiasts. This email template is perfect for restaurants looking to announce their special events for a delicious celebration of National Carbonara Day. The design beautifully integrates a modern typography that adds a fresh touch to your communications. The layout features a clean, easy-to-read design, making it perfect for any restaurant or culinary event. Whether you're sending out invites, sharing a new pasta recipe, or updating your customers about your special carbonara menu, this template can do it all. It's not just an email template, it's a flavorful journey that brings the joy of carbonara right to your subscribers' inbox. Elevate your restaurant marketing with this email template and let the celebration be as delightful as a bowl of creamy, savory carbonara.
short_description: Celebrate National Carbonara Day with this modern, clean newsletter template, perfect for restaurants and food enthusiasts. Highlight your special events and menus using its easy-to-read typography for an enticing culinary journey. This template brings the joy of carbonara right to your subscribers' inbox. Elevate your restaurant marketing with this delightful template.

designer.description: a Russian-born graphic designer based in Pasadena, California.

html_data:
Celebrate Traditions

In the world of foodies and pasta lovers, Carbonara is one of the most beloved recipes that naturally brings everyone together. On this day we honor the Carbonara dish and and encourage people to connect with their family and friends over a bowl of the favored dish.

LEARN MORE

Find Your Perfect Plate

 
Al Dente Reastaurant
 

Classic
Carbonara

A classic Italian pasta dish made with egg, Pecorino Romano cheese, guanciale, and freshly ground black pepper.

$12

ORDER
 
 
La Bella Cucina
 

Modern
Carbonara

We took a deep dive
into traditional carbonara, tracing it back to its roots
re-considered every
factor.

$14

ORDER
 
 
Biancheria Ristorante
 

Carbonara
Nuevo

There’s a lot of room for personal interpretation with spaghetti carbonara, so it’s a great staple recipe to learn and know.

$16

ORDER
 
 

City Event Locations

 
 

Kind of Pasta

The creamy egg yolk and cheese form a super velvety luxurious sauce that lightly coats the pasta, and that’s about all you need in life.

Get Directions
 
 

Variations on Classic

There’s a lot of room for personal interpretation with spaghetti carbonara, so it’s a great staple recipe to learn and know.

Get Directions
 
 
 

Create a Carbonara

One of the easiest ways is to add your favorite vegetable. Peas, asparagus, or roasted cauliflower are all great options!

Get Directions
 
 

Parmesan or not Parmesan?

But by all means, don’t use a “Parmesan topping” or something that is blended with fillers. No ma’am.

Get Directions
 
 
 
 

About Us

 

We took a deep dive into traditional carbonara, tracing it back to its roots as a peasant dish made with pantry ingredients, and re-considered every factor.

paragraph.html: The creamy egg yolk and cheese form a super velvety luxurious sauce that lightly coats the pasta, and that’s about all you need in life.
There’s a lot of room for personal interpretation with spaghetti carbonara, so it’s a great staple recipe to learn and know.
One of the easiest ways is to add your favorite vegetable. Peas, asparagus, or roasted cauliflower are all great options!
But by all means, don’t use a “Parmesan topping” or something that is blended with fillers. No ma’am.
We took a deep dive into traditional carbonara, tracing it back to its roots as a peasant dish made with pantry ingredients, and re-considered every factor.
